author: maxine--basel--gh-287-and-gh-291
content: Plan: Two-part implementation for gh#287 (CI fixes) and gh#291 (repo cleanup). gh#287: Fix CI concurrency groups to deduplicate push+PR runs, add concurrency to publish.yml. gh#291: Commit .crosslink/rules/, move design docs to knowledge, move ARCHITECTURE/ELI5 to docs/, move test scripts to scripts/, update LICENSE year, audit gitignore.
